     6Рєњ# GraphQL Skill
     7Рєњ
     8Рєњ## ВёцвфЁ
     9Рєњ
    10РєњGraphQL ВіцьѓцвДѕ ВаЋВЮўвХђьё░ Controller/Service ЖхгьўёЖ╣їВДђВЮў ВЏїьЂгьћївАюВџ░вЦ╝ ВЋѕвѓ┤ьЋювІц.

    12Рєњ## ВІцьќЅ ВаѕВ░е

    14Рєњ### 1. Schema ВаЋВЮў

    26Рєњinput CreateFeatureInput {

    30Рєњextend type Query {
    31Рєњ    feature(featureId: ID!): Feature

    34Рєњ
    35Рєњextend type Mutation {

    41Рєњ### 2. GraphQL Controller

    43РєњВюёВ╣ў: `graphql/src/main/kotlin/com/maum/backend/controller/{вЈёвЕћВЮИ}/`

    47Рєњclass FeatureController(

    52Рєњ    @PreAuthorize("hasAuthority('User')")

    56Рєњ        @Argument offset: Int?,

    58Рєњ        val response = featureService.getFeatures(userId, limit ?: 20, offset ?: 0)

    61Рєњ
    62Рєњ    @MutationMapping

    73Рєњ
    74Рєњ### 3. GraphQL Service (gRPC Client)
    75Рєњ
    76РєњВюёВ╣ў: `graphql/src/main/kotlin/com/maum/backend/service/{вЈёвЕћВЮИ}/`

    78Рєњ```kotlin

    80Рєњclass FeatureService {

    84Рєњ    fun getFeatures(userId: String, limit: Int, offset: Int): ListFeaturesResponse {
    85Рєњ        val request = ListFeaturesRequest.newBuilder()
    86Рєњ            .setUserId(userId)

    99Рєњ### 4. вІцВцЉ Вёюв╣ёВіц Вќ┤ЖиИвдгЖ▓їВЮ┤ВЁў
   100Рєњ
   101Рєњ```kotlin
   102Рєњ@QueryMapping
   103Рєњfun featureWithUser(
   104Рєњ    @UserId userId: String,
   105Рєњ    @Argument featureId: String,

    60Рєњ### QueryDSL

    67Рєњ    private val queryFactory: JPAQueryFactory,

    69Рєњ    override fun findByComplexCondition(userId: String, status: Int): List<Entity> {
    70Рєњ        val entity = QEntity.entity

    72Рєњ            .selectFrom(entity)
